2606.14325.title: Achieving Precise Text-To-Cypher Via Grounded Knowledge Graph Data Generation
2606.14325.paper_summary: Property Graphs are rapidly being adopted as database frameworks for representing heterogeneous data sources. To enable precise access to the information contained in them we need conversational interfaces based on Text-To-Cypher (Text2Cypher) parsers. This paper presents an automatic synthetic data generation method that can be leveraged to fine-tune small LLMs for this task. We conduct experiments on all the major Text-To-Cypher benchmarks, demonstrating that with our synthetic data generation approach we can significantly increase the performance of small LLMs, allowing them to compete with much larger proprietary models. This means that in settings in which models must be locally deployed we can ensure data-sovereignty without sacrificing accuracy and without costly annotation campaigns.
2606.14325.paper_summary_zh: 屬性圖正迅速被採用為表示異構數據源的數據庫框架。<lb/>為了能夠精確訪問其中包含的信息，我們需要基於文本到Cypher（Text2Cypher）解析器的對話界面。<lb/>本文提出了一種自動合成數據生成方法，可以用來微調小型LLM以完成這項任務。<lb/>我們在所有主要的文本到Cypher基準上進行實驗，證明通過我們的合成數據生成方法，我們可以顯著提高小型LLM的性能，使它們能夠與更大規模的專有模型競爭。<lb/>這意味著在必須本地部署模型的環境中，我們可以確保數據主權，而不會犧牲準確性，也不需要昂貴的標註活動。
2606.14325.author: Francesco Cazzaro et.al.
2606.14325.authors: Francesco Cazzaro, Jessica Lennon, Ariadna Quattoni
